name: search
summary: Real full-text search via Postgres tsvector + a ranked RPC, fed by a search_documents index. Debounced search hook + stub. Key-free.
postInstall: Apply supabase/0010_search.sql (search_documents with generated tsvector + GIN index + search_documents() RPC)
supabase db reset && supabase test db
Populate search_documents from your real tables (triggers shown in the SQL comments) so search stays in sync.
Use useSearch() for a debounced ranked search bar.
Replace src/features/search/ui/search-screen.tsx after the Claude Design pass
